title: Valar
description: Valar is a custom Civ Event server and associated modpack.
body:
Valar is a Lord of the Rings inspired Civilisation Event. Explore Middle Earth, build your keep, fight the Dark Lord or Journey with a Ring of Power.

This modpack gives a Vanilla + experience with added replay and voicechat mods to provide an optimal experience for you on the server. These will allow you to play with friends, engage with other groups and embark on your adventure through the world of Middle Earth.
